summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Project Atlas banking platform. All core features tested including customer login, account creation, admin dashboard, user management, and ledger operations. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend UI working correctly with minor UX improvement needed for admin top-up flow.

minor_issues.impact: Admin login failed with demo credentials
minor_issues.fix_applied: Updated UserLogin, User, UserCreate, and UserResponse schemas to allow .local domains for development

ux_improvements.issue: Top-up uses browser prompt() for amount and reason input
ux_improvements.recommendation: Replace browser prompt() with proper modal dialog for better UX and testability

passed_tests: Admin get user details with accounts

additional_notes.seed_data: Demo customer account was created successfully during testing. Initial seed data was not present but account creation flow works correctly.
additional_notes.ledger_balance: Double-entry ledger balance calculations working correctly. Account shows €0.00 initially and can be topped up by admin.
additional_notes.authentication: Both customer and admin authentication working correctly with MFA disabled for demo accounts.
additional_notes.design_compliance: UI follows design guidelines with clean, professional banking aesthetic. No dark gradients present. All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes.
additional_notes.responsive_design: Tested on desktop viewport (1920x1080). Mobile testing not performed in this iteration.
